description: Czech startup providing AI-powered ophthalmology screening and telemedicine platform for eye care. Used by opticians, pharmacies, and healthcare providers across Czech Republic and expanding in CEE.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to opticians, pharmacies, and healthcare providers
target_market: Czech and CEE eye care providers, pharmacies, employers
competitive_advantage: AI-powered screening, regulatory approval, CEE market presence

varden_fit.rationale: Specialized screening tool - could integrate eye screening into occupational health packages
